name: foundry-suite
description: ServiceNow suite for Claude, built around Fluent (now-sdk) — the Fluent-native now-mcp server plus a toolkit of AI-agent build/audit/eval/trace skills. More to come.

plugins.name: now-mcp
plugins.description: Fluent-native MCP server for ServiceNow, paired with auto-injected now-sdk/now-mcp workflow rules.

plugins.name: toolkit
plugins.description: Skills for the full ServiceNow AI Agent lifecycle — build, audit, dataset, eval-runner, and trace analysis. Pairs with now-mcp for live-instance reads and script execution.
